title: Oh Nanba Lyrics Lingaa Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Lingaa oh Nanba song lyrics
Singers : SPB
Music : AR Rahman

Oh nanba nanba vaa
Kalakkalaam vaa.
Yae nanba nanba
Vaan thirakkalaam vaa

Aasai irundhaal nanba
Sorgam thirakkum nanba
Naam aththanaikkum Aasaipattu muththeduppom nanba

Vaan vazhadhu kaiyyil
uli Idadhu kaiyyil
vazhve Namadhu kaiyyil

Oh nanba nanba vaa
Kalakkalaam vaa
Yae nanba nanba
Vaan thirakkalaam vaa

Idikka idikka idi irikka
Manakka manakka adhu manamanakka
Kalakka kalakka kalakalakka
Parakka parakka ada anal parakka

Un ellai arindhu kondaal
Thollao unaku illai
Veeney kanneerai thaandi
Thullaadhey.

Unnodu Selvam ellaam serthuko
Kondaada nanba venum paarthuko.
Hey munnorgal sonnaal yeththuko
Yezhaikku agaadhendrAL maaththiko

Oh sambo sandhosamaa
Oh sambo padalaamaa
Oh sambo vilayadalaama
Oh sambo aadalaama
Oh sambo thullallaamaa

Mannil inbam iyarkkaithaaney
Thunbam seyarkkaithaane
Mullil nee meththai thaiththu
Nee thoongaadhey

Moondru inbam kodhutha pinnaal
Kannaa nee kattupaadu
Thaandaadhey.

Idhayam thelivaaga vazhndhupaar
Inbam peridhaagi theeyumey
Unnai ellaarukum
Thandhupaar
Ulagam unadhaagi pogumey.

Oh nanba nanba vaa
Kalakkalaam vaa
Yae nanba nanba
Vaan thirakkalaam vaa

Aasai irundhaal nanba
Sorgam thirakkum nanba
Naam aththanaikkum Aasaipattu muththeduppom nanba

Vaan vazhadhu kaiyyil
uli Idadhu kaiyyil
vazhve Namadhu kaiyyil

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Oh Nanba'?

'Oh Nanba' celebrates friendship and the joy of togetherness, encouraging listeners to embrace life with enthusiasm.

How does 'Oh Nanba' fit into the plot of the movie Lingaa?

The song is a lively number that showcases the camaraderie among characters, adding a festive touch to the narrative of Lingaa.

Who are the singers of 'Oh Nanba'?

The song features the talented voices of Dinesh Kanakaratnam and the iconic SPB.

What year was 'Oh Nanba' released?

'Oh Nanba' was released in 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Oh Nanba' is a lively duet that encapsulates the essence of friendship and celebration, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and togetherness, inviting listeners to dance along. Set against the backdrop of Lingaa, it enhances the film's vibrant atmosphere and showcases the bond between characters. With the powerful vocals of Dinesh Kanakaratnam and SPB, this track leaves a lasting impression of happiness and camaraderie.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oh Nanba from Lingaa is a vibrant celebration of friendship and joy, featuring the enchanting voices of Dinesh Kanakaratnam and the legendary SPB. This upbeat track, infused with catchy rhythms, invites listeners to revel in the spirit of togetherness. Experience the magic of this unique collaboration that perfectly captures the essence of festive moments!
stanzaMeanings: Oh friend, come here. Hey friend, let's open the sky.
If there is desire, friend, it will open the gates of heaven. We will also fulfill our desires, friend.
The sky is in our hands, and our life is in our hands.
Oh friend, come here. Hey friend, let's open the sky.
Love is not just for enjoyment... it's not just for fun. Don't go beyond the limit.
If you know your limits, you won't lose. Don't let your tears fall.
Take all your wealth with you, friend. Look ahead and listen to what others say. If you don't listen, you will fall behind.
Oh joy, is it happiness? Oh joy, is it a game? Oh joy, is it a dance? Oh joy, is it a celebration? Oh joy, is it a surprise?
Happiness in the world is natural. Pain is also natural. Don't sleep with your head in the thorns.
After giving three joys, you should not close your eyes, my dear.
Live with a clear heart. Happiness will grow. Everyone will give you love. The world will become yours.
Oh friend, come here. Hey friend, let's open the sky.
If there is desire, friend, it will open the gates of heaven. We will also fulfill our desires, friend.
The sky is in our hands, and our life is in our hands.
